title: Welsh Rarebit Sandwich
description: A classic Welsh comfort food made with a rich cheese sauce, perfect for a cozy evening in.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
3. Place the bread slices under the grill until toasted.
4. In a saucepan, combine the Welsh rarebit sauce, grated cheese, fried onions, cozy spice blend, and malted milk powder.
5. Stir the mixture over low heat until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
6. Assemble the sandwiches by spreading the cheese sauce on the toasted bread slices.
7. Place the sandwiches under the grill for a few seconds to melt the cheese.
